Off Calendar May-28-2003 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Bruce S. Kapsack, Esq., 805/650-8588, for petitioner Eric John Hagerman moving for an order to show cause Why It Should Not Set Aside The Dmv'S Order
Shari B. Posner, DEPUTY ATTORNEY GENERAL 510/622-2203, for respondent and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- PETITIONER ERIC JOHN HAGERMAN's motion FOR Order To Show Why It Should Not Set Aside The Dmv'S Order -- Denied. Prevailing party is to prepare an order.(PHA/301/EH) Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR #5220

ADDED TO LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR Order To Show Why It Should Not Set Aside The Dmv'S Order
Off Calendar May-02-2003 Continued To May-28-03 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court received a written stipulation by parties requesting for continuance of hearing on PETITIONER ERIC JOHN HAGERMAN'S application
FOR Order To Show Why It Should Not Set Aside The Dmv'S Order to May 28, 2003. The
Court vacated its tentative ruling and granted the request. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (DAG/301/JU) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780
